'''鈭歴-l-zh-s''' ('''kasalzhesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ruffianize|ruffianize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-l-zh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ruffianize|ruffianize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-l-zh-s
|-
! Lemma
| kasalzhesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisalzhesoko|thisalzhesoko]] || [[word:jisalzhesoko|jisalzhesoko]] || [[word:shisalzhesoko|shisalzhesoko]] || [[word:kisalzhesoko|kisalzhesoko]]
